ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., MN, WI) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Midwest, Northeast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of testing data */,
  "school_year" TEXT /* School year (e.g., 2017-2018, 2018-2019) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of testing */,
  "sat_participation" INTEGER /* Number of SAT participants */,
  "act_participation" INTEGER /* Number of ACT participants */,
  "total_participation" INTEGER /* Total number of participants */,
  "participation_rate" REAL /* Participation rate (percentage of eligible students) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_participation_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_participation_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participation record */,
  "sat_total" INTEGER /* Total SAT scores */,
  "act_composite" REAL /* Composite ACT score */,
  "sat_evidence_based_reading_and_writing" INTEGER /* SAT Evidence-Based Reading and Writing score */,
  "sat_math" INTEGER /* SAT Math score */,
  "act_english" REAL /* ACT English score */,
  "act_math" REAL /* ACT Math score */,
  "act_reading" REAL /* ACT Reading score */,
  "act_science" REAL /* ACT Science score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_participation_id FOREIGN KEY ("participation_id") REFERENCES test_participation ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, educator) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user (e.g., school district, state department) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed (e.g., SAT scores, participation rates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, report generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., testing vendor, government agency) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data imported (e.g., SAT scores, ACT participation rates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of report template (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)
